hero.badge: AL LAMEA FOR CAR CARE PRODUCT - LIBYA
hero.title: Libya’s Partner for Professional Automotive Care
hero.subtitle: AL LAMEA is a Libyan company specialized in the manufacturing, importation and distribution of automotive care products, serving petrol stations, car wash centers, workshops and vehicle owners across Libya.

stats.group: Backed by a group with proven automotive experience

about.title: Building the Future of Automotive Care in Libya
about.groupDesc: AL LAMEA Company is a member of AL TARIQ AL LAMEA Group, one of Libya’s established automotive business groups. The Group includes AL MAYSSAM Company, the official representative of three major global automotive brands in Libya giving the Group a deep-rooted presence and expertise in the Libyan automotive sector.
about.whoDesc: AL LAMEA is a Libyan company specialized in the manufacturing, importation and exclusive distribution of automotive care products — established to develop this market in Libya through local production and partnerships with the world's leading brands.
about.pillarsIntro: AL LAMEA operates across three complementary pillars:

pillars.productionDesc: manufacturing automotive care products in Libya
pillars.representationDesc: acting as the exclusive Libyan distributor for world-leading brands

about.vision: To be Libya’s leading reference in automotive care — through quality products, trusted international partnerships and local industrial development.
about.mission: To develop Libya’s automotive care market by offering a comprehensive product range, representing world-leading brands exclusively, and launching local manufacturing projects that reduce import dependency and create local value.

products.title: Engineered for Excellence
products.intro: AL LAMEA offers a carefully curated range of automotive care products, serving petrol stations, professional car wash centers, garages, and individual vehicle owners throughout Libya.
products.washDesc:
Active Foam · Shampoo · Wheel Cleaner · Tire Cleaner · Interior Cleaner
Professional wash solutions designed for daily use at petrol stations and car wash centers.
products.fluidsDesc:
Coolant G12 · Coolant G13 · Glaceol · Windshield Washer Fluid
Fluids compliant with international OEM standards, engineered for Libya’s climate conditions.
products.protectionDesc:
Wax · Ceramic Coating · Glass Care · Plastic Care
Professional protection products for lasting vehicle care.

catalogue.comingSoon: Catalogue coming soon — contact us for details

brands.title: The Strategic Bridge Between Global Leaders and Libya
brands.intro: AL LAMEA is the exclusive Libyan gateway for world-leading automotive care brands.
brands.partnersDesc: AL LAMEA actively establishes exclusive partnerships with the world’s leading automotive care product manufacturers — bringing their full product ranges and expertise to Libya.
brands.becomePartner: For International Manufacturers requiring Libyan Market Entry →

production.subtitle: Proudly Manufacturing in Libya
production.desc: AL LAMEA is investing in local manufacturing to produce high-quality automotive care products made in Libya — ensuring competitive pricing, stable supply and long-term industrial development.

news.title: News & Insights
news.desc: Latest news, partnerships and product launches from AL LAMEA.

future.title: Pioneering the Future of Automotive Solutions
future.portalDesc: An upcoming exclusive digital dashboard designed for our strategic partners to streamline ordering, track logistics, and access real-time technical data.
future.academyDesc: A state-of-the-art training facility currently under construction. It will empower local professionals with master-level certifications in advanced detailing.

distributor.label: FOR INTERNATIONAL MANUFACTURERS
distributor.title: Your Strategic Gateway to the Libyan Market
distributor.desc: AL LAMEA provides international manufacturers with immediate access to a robust B2B network, dedicated logistics, and unparalleled market penetration across Libya.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Great Together
contact.text: Retailer, petrol station, garage or international brand? Let’s talk.

content.heading: 1. Introduction
content.text: AL TARIQ AL LAMEA GROUP respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

content.heading: 2. The Data We Collect About You
content.text: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you including: Identity Data, Contact Data, Technical Data, Usage Data, and Marketing and Communications Data.

content.heading: 3. How We Use Your Personal Data
content.text: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances: Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you, or where it is necessary for our legitimate interests.

content.heading: 4. Data Security
content.text: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorised way, altered or disclosed.

content.heading: 1. Agreement to Terms
content.text: By accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and agree that you are responsible for the agreement with any applicable local laws.

content.heading: 2. Use License
content.text: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on AL TARIQ AL LAMEA GROUP's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.

content.heading: 3. Disclaimer
content.text: All the materials on AL TARIQ AL LAMEA GROUP's website are provided "as is". AL TARIQ AL LAMEA GROUP makes no warranties, may it be expressed or implied, therefore negates all other warranties.

content.heading: 1. What Are Cookies
content.text: As is common practice with almost all professional websites this site uses cookies, which are tiny files that are downloaded to your computer, to improve your experience.

content.heading: 2. How We Use Cookies
content.text: We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed below. Unfortunately, in most cases, there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site.

content.heading: 3. Disabling Cookies
content.text: You can prevent the setting of cookies by adjusting the settings on your browser. Be aware that disabling cookies will affect the functionality of this and many other websites that you visit.
